name: Bran Muffins-in-Waiting
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix warm water with 1 cup of wheat/oat bran cereal.
2. Sift flour and baking soda together.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter until creamy. Add sugar half a cup at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Blend in eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Scrape sides of the bowl often.
5. Stir in the flour mixture half a cup at a time, alternating with butter/sour milk added half a cup at a time as well.
6. Stir in soaked bran and the remaining wheat/oat bran cereal.
7. Cover and store in refrigerator for at least 6 hours before baking.
8. To bake muffins, preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Grease 2 1/2-inch muffin cups. Stir batter gently. Fill each muffin cup with about 1/4 cup of batter.
9. Bake about 20 minutes, or until nicely browned. Remove from pan and serve hot with butter.
10. Makes 6 cups batter or about 24 2 1/2-inch muffins.
